title: Fix the problem with writing a file using streams and not using RAM
author: zlooun

comments.author: Siemienik
comments.body: Thank you for the contribution; I believe it enhances the handling of large file writing 🎉. Please bear with me, as this change breaks backward-compatibility and will need to wait for the next major release (5.0).

comments.author: AmberWilkie
comments.body:
Hello just hoping to bump some attention here. This PR would be very helpful for my work. I'd offer to help get it in but honestly I learned everything I know about streams and buffers trying to understand why `await workbook.commit()` was hanging forever. In my case, it's because my S3 upload releases the stream, which I expected to do after committing the workbook. So effectively that `await` will be forever if I put it before the S3 upload terminates.

(Or then again, I could be off base here - like I said, new to streams).

comments.author: julesblancphin
comments.body: Are there any plans to merge this PR?
